design_philosophy.core_concept: A curated, hand-illustrated food guide for the digital age. Warm, tactile, and authentic.
design_philosophy.aesthetic: Mediterranean Warmth meets Parisian Chic. Think: textured paper, ink stamps, sun-baked colors, and elegant typography.
principles: Fusion: Digital utility x Analog soul (Maps + Illustrations)
Emotion: Hunger and Wanderlust. Every image must look delicious or transportive.
Content: The 'Guide' voice. Expert, opinionated, and curated.
Tactility: No flat colors. Use noise, grain, and subtle borders to mimic paper.

usage_rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-serif font-bold tracking-tight text-ink-black

typography.import_instruction: Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS: Playfair Display (400,700), Patrick Hand (400), Lato (400,700).

texture.noise: url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,...') or simple CSS noise overlay opacity-5

borders.card: rounded-xl border border-stone/20 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, rounded line caps. Use 'Tomato' color for active states.

layout_strategies.mobile_first: Bottom sheet navigation for maps. Full-screen immersive lists.
layout_strategies.map_view: Full height minus header/nav. Custom markers.
layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use for 'Explore' page. Mix of large featured pizzerias and small category tiles.

buttons.primary: bg-tomato text-white font-sans font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:bg-tomato_hover hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-paper text-ink border-2 border-ink/10 font-sans font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-full hover:border-ink/30

cards.pizzeria_card: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md group cursor-pointer border border-stone/10
cards.image_aspect: aspect-[4/3] object-cover w-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500

badges.neapolitan: bg-tomato/10 text-tomato border border-tomato/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.roman: bg-terracotta/10 text-terracotta border border-terracotta/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.verified: bg-olive/10 text-olive border border-olive/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

map_markers.neapolitan: Red circular pin with pizza slice icon
map_markers.roman: Yellow/Terracotta square pin with pizza slice icon

assets.icons_instruction: Use lucide-react. For map pins, create a custom divIcon in Leaflet containing a Lucide icon.

setup: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette.
Add the Google Fonts to the index.html or CSS.
implementation_priorities: 1. Map View: This is the core. Make it smooth. Use custom markers.
2. Pizzeria Card: Needs to look delicious. High quality images.
3. Filters: Make them accessible and easy to toggle (Pills style).
4. 'Surprise Me': A fun, animated button that picks a random spot.
anti_patterns: DO NOT use default blue links.
DO NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Ink Black (#2B2D42).
DO NOT make it look like a dashboard. It's a lifestyle guide.

universal_guidelines.interactions: All buttons must have active/hover states. Cards should lift on hover.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast on the Cream background. Use darker Ink Black for body text.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., 'filter-neapolitan', 'map-pin-1').
